changes_made.summary: Replaced local PluginTransportContract interface with imports from @opencode-ai/plugin/desktop
details: Added import type { PluginTransport, DesktopPluginApi } from '@opencode-ai/plugin/desktop'
Added compile-time type assertion const _verify: PluginTransport = null as unknown as PluginTransport
Removed local PluginTransportContract interface (lines 11-17 of original)
Renamed createFakeTransport to createTestTransport, typed with real PluginTransport type
Changed DesktopPluginApi shape test to use real DesktopPluginApi type instead of Record<string, unknown>
All 8 tests verify structural contract against production types from @opencode-ai/plugin/desktop

changes_made.summary: Replaced disconnected mock bridge tests with ElectronAPI type-contract verification
details: Removed PluginBridgeContract interface (was duplicating ElectronAPI type)
Removed createMockBridge() with listener re-implementation (was testing fake, not real bridge)
Removed all 7 mock bridge tests (lines 57-94 of original) that tested createMockBridge
Removed 3 IPC channel assertion tests (lines 102-113 of original) duplicating plugin-transport-channels.test.ts
Added 6 structural contract tests using Pick<ElectronAPI, ...> verifying real production type signatures
All tests verify the production ElectronAPI type boundary without mocking electron or reimplementing bridge logic

plugin_typecheck.result: Pre-existing bun:test TS2307 error only (same as all test files in repo)

desktop_tests.result: 116 pass, 9 fail, 1 error — all failures pre-existing and unrelated to repair (3 github-ipc IpcResult wrapping, 5 plugin-transport-channels test-ordering interference, 1 shell-env electron-log ReferenceError)

desktop_typecheck.result: All errors pre-existing (solid-js module resolution, electron-mock type errors, dialog component type issues) — zero errors from modified files

remaining_blockers.issue: Pre-existing: IPC channel constants PLUGIN_SEND, PLUGIN_INVOKE, PLUGIN_PUSH resolve to undefined in full test suite due to test-ordering interference (pass in isolation)
Pre-existing: 3 Github IPC tests fail due to IpcResult wrapping mismatch (expect raw result, receive {ok, value} envelope)
Pre-existing: electron-log module initializer errors with __electronLog is not defined in test environment

pre_existing_delta_note: Both files were untracked before edit; no committed baseline to compare. All changes are additive replacements from disconnected test patterns to production-boundary-aligned structural contract tests.
